courses.name: Boost Productivity with Gen AI
courses.description: This two-day program is designed to enhance productivity through Generative AI, blending lectures with hands-on workshops and interactive Q&A sessions. Day 1 focuses on the fundamentals, covering the impact and practical applications of AI alongside practical exercises in prompt engineering. Day 2 advances into specialized tasks, including automated content classification, presentation creation, and image generation. Throughout the course, participants engage in advanced techniques and self-assessments, ultimately concluding with a review of learning objectives and a certificate presentation to prepare them for immediate implementation in their workflows.
learningOutcomes: Understand multimodal Generative AI, its usage and be aware of potential misinformation
Demonstrate the ability to interact with AI by crafting clear, structured prompts and generating useful responses
Create written content, create recipes and plan travel itineraries using the Generative AI platform
Extract insights from data and create infographics using the Generative AI platform
Reducing Time to Write Lengthy/Time-Consuming Emails
Extracting Insights/ Contents from Lengthy Documents
Generating Voluminous Data for Testing
Presentations are faster with AI assistance
Automate content classification

courses.name: Click Wisely: Everyday Internet Safety
courses.description: The Click Wisely: Everyday Internet Safety course equips participants with essential cybersecurity knowledge to navigate the internet safely and confidently. Participants will gain a clear understanding of key cybersecurity concepts, learn about common cyber threats, and discover practical measures to safeguard themselves and their organisations against potential attacks.
learningOutcomes: Identify key cybersecurity concepts, common cyber threats, and practical measures to protect themselves and their organisations from potential attacks
Recognise fundamental cybersecurity principles
Identify various types of cyber threats, such as phishing, malware, and ransomware
Implement best practices for internet safety, including strong password management, safe browsing habits, and recognising suspicious activity
targetAudience: IT and Non-IT who are interested

courses.name: AI in Human Resources Management
courses.description: The AI in Human Resources Management workshop equips professionals with the essential technical and strategic skills needed to thrive in an AI-driven labor market. Participants will explore practical applications—such as recruitment automation, engagement analytics, and predictive planning—through real-world case studies and hands-on activities. By prioritizing data literacy, the program empowers HR practitioners to move beyond intuition, using empirical evidence to drive informed decision-making and organizational growth. Ultimately, this collaborative experience fosters a community of practice, leaving attendees with the strategic mindset and networking connections necessary to lead continuous improvement within their organizations.
learningOutcomes: Understand the fundamental concepts of artificial intelligence and its applications in Human Resources Management
Identify key AI tools and technologies that can enhance recruitment, employee engagement, and performance management processes
Analyse case studies demonstrating the successful implementation of AI solutions in HR practices to improve decision-making efficiency
Evaluate ethical considerations and challenges associated with using AI in HR, including bias mitigation and data privacy issues
Develop a strategic plan for integrating AI into existing HR workflows to optimise talent acquisition and workforce management

courses.name: Cybersecurity Essentials
courses.description: The Cybersecurity workshop is designed to equip learners with essential skills that are increasingly in demand within the labor market. As cyber threats continue to evolve, organizations across various sectors are prioritizing cybersecurity measures to protect their sensitive data and maintain operational integrity. This workshop provides participants with a comprehensive understanding of core cybersecurity principles, including risk management, threat analysis, and incident response strategies. By engaging in hands-on activities and real-world scenarios, learners will gain practical experience that enhances their ability to identify vulnerabilities and implement effective security protocols.
learningOutcomes: Understand the key concepts and terminology related to cybersecurity, including threats, vulnerabilities, and risk management
Identify common types of cyber threats and attacks, such as phishing, malware, and ransomware, along with their potential impacts on organizations
Develop skills to implement basic security measures for protecting personal and organizational data against cyber threats
Recognize the importance of compliance with legal regulations and standards in cybersecurity practices within various industries
Cultivate an awareness of best practices for maintaining a secure online presence through safe browsing habits and effective password management
targetAudience: Students in Computer Science or IT Programs

courses.name: Bitcoin & Blockchain 101
courses.description: Learn the basics of Bitcoin and blockchain, including how they work, why they matter, and where they are used in the real world.
learningOutcomes: Explain how blockchain and Bitcoin work at a technical level
Differentiate public, private, and permissioned ledgers
Understand wallets, keys, and transaction basics
Explore real-world blockchain applications and limitations
Assess security and regulatory considerations

courses.name: Big Data Analytics
courses.description: The Foundations of Data Analytics workshop is designed to equip learners with essential skills that are increasingly in demand across various industries. In today’s data-driven world, organizations rely heavily on data analytics to inform decision-making processes and drive strategic initiatives. This workshop provides participants with a comprehensive understanding of fundamental concepts such as data collection, cleaning, analysis, and visualization. By engaging in hands-on activities and real-world case studies, learners will not only grasp theoretical knowledge but also develop practical skills that can be directly applied in the workplace.
learningOutcomes: Understand the key concepts and terminology of data analytics, including types of data, data collection methods, and basic statistical principles
Develop skills in using common data analytics tools and software for data manipulation and visualization
Apply foundational techniques for analyzing datasets to derive meaningful insights and support decision making processes
Evaluate the ethical considerations surrounding data usage, including privacy concerns and responsible reporting practices
Demonstrate the ability to communicate analytical findings effectively through written reports and presentations tailored to various audiences
targetAudience: Students in Data Science or Related Fields

courses.name: Principles of E-commerce
courses.description: The Principles of E-Commerce workshop is designed to equip learners with essential skills that are increasingly demanded in today's digital economy. As businesses continue to shift towards online platforms, understanding the foundational principles of e-commerce becomes crucial for anyone looking to thrive in the labor market. This workshop covers key topics such as online marketing strategies, payment processing systems, and customer relationship management within an e-commerce context. By engaging with these subjects, participants will gain a comprehensive understanding of how e-commerce operates and the various components that contribute to successful online business practices.
learningOutcomes: Understand the fundamental concepts and terminology of e-commerce, including types of e-commerce models such as B2B, B2C, C2C, and C2B
Analyze the key components of an effective e-commerce strategy, including website design, user experience (UX), digital marketing techniques, and payment processing systems
Evaluate various legal and ethical considerations in ecommerce operations, such as data privacy laws (e.g., GDPR) and consumer protection regulations
Develop skills to assess market trends and consumer behavior in the online marketplace using analytical tools and metrics for informed decision-making
Create a basic business plan for an e-commerce venture that incorporates elements like target audience identification, product sourcing strategies, pricing models, and promotional tactics

courses.name: Beginner Content Creator Forum
courses.description: This programme equips participants with essential TikTok knowledge, including platform fundamentals and content trends. Participants will learn to create high-quality short-form videos using smartphone filming and basic mobile videography techniques, edit engaging content with beginner-friendly applications, and develop a clear Personal IP by defining their identity and niche. By the end of the programme, participants will be able to produce confident, consistent, and purposeful TikTok content aligned with personal or brand goals.
learningOutcomes: Understand TikTok fundamentals, platform features, and current content trends
Record high-quality short-form videos using smartphone cameras and basic filming techniques
Edit engaging short-form videos using beginner-friendly editing application, CapCut
Develop, build, and position a clear Personal IP (identity, niche, and content direction)
Create confident, consistent, and relevant TikTok content aligned with personal or brand objectives

courses.name: Digitalisation Masterclass – Future-Proof Your Business
courses.description: At the end of this 3-day program, participants will understand the fundamentals of digitalisation, learn how digitisation can address organisational challenges, and discover ways to enhance their competitive advantage.
learningOutcomes: Define and explain the fundamental concepts and components of digitalisation
Identify organisational challenges and areas for improvement using different frameworks
Develop a tailored digitalisation implementation plan that aligns with their organisation's goals

courses.name: Blockchain Applications and Smart Contracts
courses.description: The Blockchain Applications and Smart Contracts workshop provides learners with the technical and strategic skills needed to excel in an increasingly decentralized labor market. Through hands-on development of decentralized applications (dApps) and smart contracts on platforms like Ethereum, participants gain the practical expertise required to implement secure and transparent business solutions. Beyond technical proficiency, the program emphasizes industry networking and mentorship, connecting attendees with professionals to enhance career prospects. By exploring current trends and emerging roles, participants leave equipped with the foundational knowledge and specialized expertise necessary to navigate and lead in the evolving digital economy.
learningOutcomes: Understand Blockchain: Learn the basics of blockchain technology and its key components
Explore FinTech Changes: Discover how traditional banking has evolved with digital finance and future trends
Learn About Smart Contracts: Understand what smart contracts are and how they are used in finance
Know the Regulations: Identify key regulations affecting blockchain and FinTech
Study Real-World Examples: Analyze successful case studies of blockchain applications in finance

courses.name: Introduction to Generative AI and Large Language Models
courses.description: The Introduction to Generative AI and Large Language Models workshop is designed to equip learners with essential skills that are increasingly in demand within the labor market. As industries continue to embrace digital transformation, understanding generative AI technologies becomes crucial for professionals across various sectors. This workshop provides a foundational knowledge of how large language models operate, their applications, and implications in realworld scenarios. By engaging with these concepts, participants will not only enhance their technical proficiency but also develop critical thinking skills necessary for navigating complex challenges posed by emerging technologies.
learningOutcomes: Understand the fundamental concepts of Generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs), including their architecture and functioning
Identify various applications of Generative AI and LLMs across different industries, highlighting real-world use cases
Analyze ethical considerations and challenges associated with the deployment of Generative AI technologies in society
Develop basic skills to interact with popular LLM APIs, enabling participants to create simple text generation projects
Evaluate the performance of different generative models through hands-on exercises, fostering critical thinking about model selection based on specific tasks

courses.name: Introduction to Digital Economics
courses.description: The Introduction to Digital Economics workshop is designed to equip learners with essential skills that are increasingly demanded in today’s labor market. As the economy becomes more digitized, understanding digital economics—encompassing concepts such as e-commerce, online consumer behavior, and digital marketing strategies—becomes crucial for job seekers. This workshop will provide participants with a foundational knowledge of how digital platforms operate and influence economic activities, enabling them to navigate the complexities of modern business environments effectively. By engaging with real-world case studies and practical examples, learners will gain insights into current trends and challenges faced by businesses in the digital landscape.
learningOutcomes: Understand the fundamental concepts of digital economics and its impact on traditional economic models
Analyze the role of data as a key asset in digital economies and how it influences business strategies
Evaluate various digital platforms and their economic implications for consumers and businesses alike
Identify emerging trends in digital currencies, blockchain technology, and their potential effects on global markets
Develop critical thinking skills to assess the ethical considerations surrounding privacy, security, and regulation in the context of digital economics

courses.name: Digital Real Estate and Proptech
courses.description: The Digital Real Estate and Proptech workshop is designed to equip learners with essential skills that are increasingly demanded in the modern labor market. As technology continues to reshape various industries, real estate is no exception. This workshop will provide participants with a comprehensive understanding of how digital tools and platforms can enhance property management, investment analysis, and customer engagement. By focusing on practical applications of technology within the real estate sector, learners will gain hands-on experience using software solutions for virtual tours, data analytics for market trends, and blockchain for secure transactions. Such competencies not only make them more attractive candidates but also prepare them to thrive in an evolving job landscape where tech-savvy professionals are highly sought after.
learningOutcomes: Understand the fundamental concepts of digital real estate and how technology is transforming the property market
Identify key Proptech innovations and their applications in enhancing property management, sales, and investment strategies
Analyze case studies of successful digital real estate platforms to extract best practices for implementation
Evaluate the impact of data analytics and artificial intelligence on decision-making processes within the real estate sector
Develop a strategic plan for integrating Proptech solutions into existing real estate operations to improve efficiency and customer engagement
targetAudience: Tech Entrepreneurs focusing on Real Estate Solutions

courses.name: Blockchain Governance and Compliance
courses.description: The Blockchain Governance and Compliance workshop is designed to equip learners with essential skills that are increasingly sought after in the labor market. As organizations across various sectors begin to adopt blockchain technology, there is a growing need for professionals who understand not only the technical aspects of blockchain but also its governance frameworks and compliance requirements. This workshop will provide participants with a comprehensive understanding of how blockchain operates within regulatory environments, enabling them to navigate complex legal landscapes effectively. By focusing on real-world applications and case studies, learners will gain practical insights into how businesses can implement compliant blockchain solutions while adhering to industry standards.
learningOutcomes: Understand the fundamental principles of blockchain technology and its implications for governance and compliance
Identify key regulatory frameworks affecting blockchain applications across different jurisdictions
Analyze the role of smart contracts in enhancing transparency and accountability within blockchain systems
Evaluate best practices for implementing effective governance structures in decentralized organizations using blockchain technology
Develop strategies to ensure compliance with legal requirements while leveraging the benefits of blockchain innovations

courses.name: Blockchain Applications in Finance
courses.description: The Blockchain Applications in Finance workshop is designed to equip learners with a comprehensive understanding of how blockchain technology can be leveraged within the financial sector. As the finance industry increasingly adopts digital solutions, knowledge of blockchain becomes essential for professionals seeking to remain competitive. This workshop will cover fundamental concepts such as decentralized ledgers, smart contracts, and cryptocurrency transactions, providing participants with a solid foundation that aligns with current market demands. By engaging in hands-on activities and real-world case studies, learners will not only grasp theoretical aspects but also develop practical skills that are directly applicable in various financial roles.
learningOutcomes: Understand the fundamental principles of blockchain technology and its relevance to the finance sector
Identify various use cases of blockchain applications in financial services, including payments, lending, and asset management
Analyze the benefits and challenges associated with implementing blockchain solutions in traditional financial systems
Evaluate real-world case studies demonstrating successful integration of blockchain technology within financial institutions
Develop a strategic framework for assessing potential blockchain projects tailored to specific financial business needs

courses.name: Practical AI Skills For Work and Study
courses.description: The Practical AI Skills For Work and Study workshop is designed to equip learners with a comprehensive understanding of how AI technology can be leveraged within various professional and academic settings. As AI continues to transform industries, knowledge of its applications becomes essential for professionals seeking to remain competitive. This workshop will cover fundamental concepts such as machine learning, natural language processing, and computer vision, providing participants with a solid foundation that aligns with current market demands. By engaging in hands-on activities and real-world case studies, learners will not only grasp theoretical aspects but also develop practical skills that are directly applicable in various roles.
learningOutcomes: Understand the fundamental principles of AI technology and its relevance to work and study
Identify various use cases of AI applications in different industries, including healthcare, finance, and education
Analyze the benefits and challenges associated with implementing AI solutions in traditional business systems
Evaluate real-world case studies demonstrating successful integration of AI technology within organizations
Develop a strategic framework for assessing potential AI projects tailored to specific professional and academic needs
